real_loop_vs_one_shot.one_line_evidence: Workflow graph, feedback channels, and loop progress are present.

win_condition_rigor.one_line_evidence: Loop Contract declares deterministic budget, action, and maturity checks.

test_selection_cannot_be_gamed.one_line_evidence: Required tests are tag-covered and backed by executed passed results.

self_grading_risk.one_line_evidence: Independent truth is declared outside model self-assessment.

feedback_fidelity.one_line_evidence: Budget and test observations are modeled in workflow state.

control_channel.one_line_evidence: State-level steer, abort, interrupt, and escalate support is modeled.

failure_handling_escalation.one_line_evidence: No-progress and budget exhaustion escalation context is modeled.

highest_leverage_gap: Move from fixture-level evidence to runtime enforcement across all autonomous loop phases.

blocks_autonomy: Runtime enforcement across all production loop phases
fragile_under_load: Budget evidence is local and can become stale
polish: Render budget status in human review reports

one_question: Which ADLC workflow should be the first production self-autonomous loop rather than assisted loop?
